summary: Frontend testing iteration 10 - Verified new Seasonal Travel Guide feature on Seasons page. All 7 test cases passed: Section visible with 4 weather type buttons, each button shows 4 destination cards with flag/name/temp/highlight, destinations update when month changes.
passed_tests: Feature 1: Seasonal Travel Guide section exists below Top 5 Destinations section [data-testid='seasonal-guide-section']
Feature 2: 4 weather type buttons visible - Sunny & Warm, Snow & Winter, Mild & Pleasant, Monsoon Adventures
Feature 3: Clicking 'Sunny & Warm' [data-testid='weather-guide-sunny'] shows 4 destination cards with temperature ranges
Feature 4: Clicking 'Snow & Winter' [data-testid='weather-guide-snow'] shows 4 ski/snow destinations
Feature 5: Clicking 'Mild & Pleasant' [data-testid='weather-guide-mild'] shows 4 mild weather destinations
Feature 6: Clicking 'Monsoon Adventures' [data-testid='weather-guide-rainy'] shows 4 rainy season destinations
Feature 7: Each destination card shows country flag (flagcdn.com), name, temperature range (°C), and highlight text
Feature 8: Month selector change updates destinations correctly (verified March vs July different destinations)
critical_code_review_comments: Seasons.js lines 145-474: weatherGuideData object properly structured with 4 weather types (sunny, snow, mild, rainy) each containing 12 months of destination data
Seasons.js lines 772-892: Seasonal Travel Guide section with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Seasons.js line 485: selectedWeatherType state properly controls which destinations display
Seasons.js lines 838-866: Destination cards correctly render flag, name, temp, highlight with [data-testid='guide-dest-{code}']
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seasonal Travel Guide feature fully implemented and tested. Located in Seasons.js lines 772-892. Uses weatherGuideData object (lines 145-474) with 4 weather types and month-specific destinations. State managed via selectedWeatherType (line 485). All test-ids working correctly.

features_verified.destination_cards: Seasons.js lines 838-866: Cards with flag, name, temp, highlight, [data-testid='guide-dest-{code}']
features_verified.month_selector_integration: Uses selectedMonthAbbrev from existing month selector to filter weatherGuideData destinations
features_verified.pro_tips: Seasons.js lines 871-879: Weather-specific travel tips displayed below destinations

test_screenshots: .screenshots/seasonal_guide_section.png - Shows 4 weather type buttons in Seasonal Travel Guide section
.screenshots/sunny_destinations.png - Shows 4 sunny destinations (Egypt, Morocco, India Goa, Cuba)
.screenshots/snow_destinations.png - Shows 4 snow destinations (Switzerland, Canada, Austria, Colorado)
.screenshots/mild_destinations.png - Shows 4 mild destinations (Japan, Spain, Portugal, Italy)
.screenshots/rainy_destinations.png - Shows 4 rainy destinations (Nicaragua, Honduras, Colombia, Ecuador)
.screenshots/destinations_after_month_change.png - Confirms destinations change after month selector update
